manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Please help me with the following task. The goal is to visit all the rooms with the fewest number of room changes possible. In each room, you need to decide the direction to go in. Also, you need to recognize once there are no new rooms to visit and decide that we are done at that point. Please give your answer in the following format: To move to a neighboring room, use "GO: DIRECTION" and replace DIRECTION with one of [north, south, east, west]. To stop the exploration, answer with "DONE" instead. Omit any other text.
Here is an example:
You are in the Kitchen. Currently available directions: south, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered a Lobby. Currently available directions: east, north. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
...
You have made a step and entered a Bedroom. Currently available directions: south. What is your next instruction?
DONE
Let us start. You are in the Recreation room. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Billiard room. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Game room. Currently available directions: north, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Living room. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Game room. Currently available directions: north, west. What is your next instruction?
GO: north
You have made a step and entered Billiard room. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: west
You have made a step and entered Recreation room. Currently available directions: east. What is your next instruction?
GO: east
You have made a step and entered Billiard room. Currently available directions: south, west, east. What is your next instruction?
GO: south
You have made a step and entered Game room. Currently available directions: north, west. What is your next instruction?

message.reasoning:
We seem to be stuck in a loop. The map: Starting Recreation (east) -> Billiard. Billiard has south, west, east. Went south to Game; Game directions north, west. Went west to Living, east back to Game, north to Billiard, west to Recreation, east to Billiard, south to Game... It's cyc.

We need to explore all rooms with minimal moves, and stop when done. Which rooms have we visited? So far: Recreation, Billiard, Game, Living.

Is there any other room? Possibly some directions not yet taken: At Billiard we have east (back to Recreation), west (maybe another room), south (to Game). We haven't taken west from Billiard. At Game we have west (to Living) and north (to Billiard). We have taken both. At Living only east (to Game). So only unexplored direction is Billiard west leading to an unknown room. Must go there. So from current location (Game) we need to go north? Wait currently at Game (north, west). We can go north back to Billiard, then west to new room. So instruction: GO: north.
